diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Aortic Stenosis and Coronary Artery Disease (CAD)
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient has a longstanding history of dyspnea, mild chest discomfort, and fatigue with exertion. Stress testing indicated ischemia in the Cx territory, alongside findings from left heart catheterization which revealed coronary artery disease. An echo confirmed moderate aortic valve stenosis and moderate aortic regurgitation, leading to the diagnosis of aortic stenosis and CAD.
